{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121000BA6DB46D37F3C7889360"}"},"total":1154},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468532356756980542","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容还是不错的，写的也很好，唯一就是说，能不能把人名写出来啊，每次一有对话就要思考老半天这是谁和谁和谁在对话，真的很影响后面的观看啊作者大大"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738907779,"group_id":"7356547088424897561","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9I4PcsZcTkaE3Hbx8eGRpHpp7h4MK03JXKB1T2rJXJ7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a4a56538cb9a4b3eb7053b117529b2d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624363&x-signature=WY2ooF%2FexyU%2FkMTTph9DmkltarQ%3D","user_id":"4283308120221224","user_name":"是宋小姐耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4283308120221224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7356547088424897561","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：背景架空，ABO文，有CP向
SDFJ是一家专业侦探培训机构，专门“收”一些漂亮且聪明的小孩儿，经过公司里一系列的个人培训，分化后，本着“物竞天择,适者生内存”的法则，优胜劣汰，最终只留下了七名出类拔萃的少年。
面冷心细全能ACE队长——（松木檀香A）
美艳傲娇心理侧写师——（橙花O）
爱笑甜心小机灵鬼痕检员——（柠檬O）
武力值MAX行动李超强刑警——（海盐A）
不苟言笑却总能制造笑点法医——（葡萄柚A）
视力5.0热爱打坐狙击手——（红酒A）
过目不忘破碎感极强的网警——（玫瑰O）
这其中有人认识，有人关系非常，有人不打不相识……
突如其来的组队，少年们更加需要用最短的时间磨合默契，携手并肩，共同面对未知危险，甚至是死亡。案件扑朔迷离，毫无逻辑，而七位少年用他们的聪明才智和赤诚勇气突破重重关卡，共同成长。
PS：案件有真实的，也有改编的，也有从周边的故事衍生的。
背景架空，请勿上升真人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fad454d1d00ffd5269eb4b04e730ece1","author":"油炸花生果","author_id":"","book_id":"7356547088424897561","book_name":"TNT：小组探案集","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444842115047115800","read_count":"12413","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2822723"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"2465","tags":"娱乐圈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c4055ad12db3c97ce02829738d9477fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250200&x-signature=Tk%2BG7T%2FlVn36gcVSASQjRENY%2FpU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"213"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121000BA6DB46D37F3C7889360"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11912,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6334},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7534283854259880766","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个是查案的一本
